title: Durindfire (crystal)
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Halcyon.jpg|thumb|right|250px|[[Keiran Halcyon]]'s lightsaber had a Durindfire gem.]]

The '''Durindfire''' gem was a precious [[Lightsaber crystal/Legends|crystal]] found on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].

Few Durindfires ever left the planet, though some were bought and sold by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] to help finance the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]] project. The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] was able to pinpoint the Empire's various development sites by tracking the movement of these gems, and additionally used this information to uncover the origins of the [[TIE/ph "Phantom" Multi-Role Stealth Starfighter/Legends|TIE Phantom]] Project.

A Durindfire gem was key in adding a distinctive silver sheen to any [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] blade. This stone was traditionally used by the Jedi of the [[Horn family|Halcyon/Horn family]].

[[Jawa/Legends|Jawas]] used Durindfires to make lenses to protect their sensitive [[Rodent/Legends|rodent]]-like eyesight from the bright sunlight. Most of other inhabitants of Tatooine, though, didn't know the value of these gems, found in the desert sands, and thought them to be worthless.<ref name="NEGAS">''[[The New Essential Guide to Alien Species]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The novella ''[[Side Trip]]'', in which the Durindfire first appeared, uses the alternate spelling "Durind Firegem".
